question: To be classified or maintained as classified, information must meet all of the following criteria except:
canonical_answer: The information must be owned by, produced by or for, or under the control of the U.S. Government (Incorrect) The unauthorized disclosure of the information must be reasonably expected to cause damage, serious damage, or exceptionally grave damage to national security (incorrect)
